title: 6 curl and jq Commands for Faster API Triage
summary: Triage API responses faster with curl and jq commands for health checks, auth checks, failure extraction, item counts, and quick status summaries.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with curl and jq

verification_setup: Confirm curl and jq are installed.
Replace the example URLs, tokens, and JSON field names before running the commands.
Use endpoints that return JSON matching the example filters.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/curl_and_jq_commands_for_faster_api_triage.sh against real API endpoints.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally against a disposable HTTP server serving sample JSON payloads. Replace the example endpoints, auth values, and field names before running against real APIs.
